A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed totals by grouping sales on exact lowercased title+artist and filtering out 'None' values (execute_python:34 using data from query_db:5 and query_db:6), which is an overly simplistic entity-resolution plan that missed variants of the same song (e.g., differing titles/artists), leading it to incorrectly pick "Groovey" by Rich Matteson instead of the true top-revenue track.
